responsible_diffs.description: Loop-based distance-to-reference calculation was vectorized; this changes optimizer numerics in the SLSQP objective path.

Loop-based relative-nearness aggregation was vectorized; restoring the old loop helper with cal_individual_cost reproduced legacy candidate tracks and weights exactly for a differing diagnostic frame.

non_responsible_diffs: sigma kernel unchanged at sigma=0.1 and sigma2=0.05
seven-candidate IPV grid unchanged for matched accurate calls
planning/Lattice.py byte-identical; utility.py and lattice_planner.py layout/import-only
candidate task reconstruction not responsible: current helper path and legacy-style deepcopy loop had zero track/weight difference inside current package
solver_preset not responsible: matched run used local solver_preset=accurate, resolving to default SLSQP
verdict: Local estimator files last changed on 2026-06-19 in commit 0827f504 as a package-layout refactor, but the genuine sigma01-incompatible logic change was introduced on 2026-06-15 in commit a0fee535. The current local estimator is genuinely drifted from the pinned sigma01-generation code; the earlier parity failure was not only a parameter/default/entrypoint mismatch.
